subcodes.first_line: O thou who art divine victory from God and heavenly service! Arise in accordance with the good-pleasure of the Sovereign of Days, and give freely [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من هو نصر من الله نصرت حقیقیه و خدمت ملکوتیه قیام برضای ملیک ایامست و بذل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
